characters.name: Bert
characters.description: GenderMaleSpeciesBearRelativesUnknownLikesRock musicNappingBedtime storiesCircus actsDancingRiding a unicycleFriendsWillaSteve and EdieVoiced byTodd Fenell Bertis a brown┬Ābear who lives with Willa and the other animal pals. It's implied that he was a member of the circus, based on how he rides a unicycle for transportation. He is usually seen sleeping. His natural sleeping habitat is along withKokoandSamuelin the living room, and he also naps outside in the backyard on a hammock. characters.name: Dooley
characters.description: GenderMaleŌÖé’ĖÄSpeciesHumanRelativesUnnamed parentsLikesCowboysScienceAstronomySuperheroesGorillasBananasRocketships & lavender stuffDislikesThe idea of himDancingFriendsWillaEvelynEnemiesSara, Kara, and LaraGusThe Bunnies(sometimes)Voiced bySamantha Reynolds Dooleyis Willa's best friend and her next-door neighbor. Dooley is a young boy of average height with slight tan skin, freckles, brown eyes, and wavy black hair He wears glasses, a purple shirt, brown cargo pants, and black shoes. Dooley is nerdy and has an interest in scientific inventions[1]and astronomy.[2]He is more sensible thanWilla.

characters.name: Edie and Steve
characters.description: Edie and SteveGenderFemaleŌÖĆ’ĖÄ (Edie)MaleŌÖé’ĖÄ (Steve)SpeciesSealsRelativesUnknownLikesFishShow businessTheaterJazz/Latin musicVolleyballSwimmingBalancing thingsBallsPerforming on stagePlaying the bike hornsPartiesSee-sawsDislikesThe idea of someone quitting a showFriendsEach other (Married)Samuel(temporarily)WillaWilla's DadBertThe BunniesEnemiesEvelyn(on her side)Mr. Tremble(on his side)Sara, Kara, and Lara(on their sides)Voiced byBob BoyleJennifer Seguin Edie and Steveare a pair of seals who are very passionate about show business. They sleep in the bathtub and play in the backyard swimming pool. They are similar to each other and like many of the same things, but Steve is more outgoing than Edie. They are similar to each other and like many of the same things, but Steve is more outgoing than Edie. Their favorite hobbies are performance-related, they love singing Broadway-style show tunes and doing circus acts such as balancing balls and playing the bulb horns.

characters.name: Evelyn
characters.description: EvelynGenderFemaleSpeciesHumanRelativesUnknownLikesAmusement park ridesDislikesPerforming on stageThe sound of a bike hornFriendsWillaDooleySparkleEnemiesWilla (sometimes)Steve and EdieVoiced byLisa Norton EvelynIs WillaŌĆÖs Roommate Evelyn is a slightly tall girl She has fair skin, freckles, brown eyes, and long orangish-brown hair she is usually seen wearing a long-sleeved dark-green shirt, blue capris, green socks, and black shoes. Evelyn occasionally gets wrapped into Willa's adventures. She seems to be Pessimistic, Cranky, Grumpy, Grouchy a lot and gets discouraged easily. But Don't Worry She usually smiles.

characters.name: Gus
characters.description: GenderMaleSpeciesAlligatorLikesSwimmingFriendsWillaVoiced byCorey Burton Gusis one of Willa's pets. He's the toughest of the animal pals. Despite his Rude, Pessimistic, Cranky, Grumpy, Grouchy And Obnoxious Behavior, Gus is usually a quite semi-helpful alligator. He's constantly hungry and always sleeps under Willa's bed. There is a running gag where he tries to eat the bunnies in most episodes, but he's always caught by Willa or one of the animals. Despite his Rude, Pessimistic, Cranky, Grumpy, Grouchy And Obnoxious Behavior, Gus is usually a quite semi-helpful alligator. He's constantly hungry and always sleeps under Willa's bed. There is a running gag where he tries to eat the bunnies in most episodes, but he's always caught by Willa or one of the animals.

characters.name: Jenny
characters.description: JennyGenderFemaleŌÖĆ’ĖÄSpeciesGiraffeLikesFriendsFriendsWillaWilla's DadSparkleDooleyVoiced byAlex Borstein Jennyis a reticulated giraffe who is one of Willa's animals. Jenny is the wisest out of all the animals. She acts like a mother or an older sister to Willa (and possibly Dooley). Since her mom is not around, it is likely that Jenny has taken on the role of a mother figure. She enjoys assisting Willa or Dooley on her adventures and giving great advice. However, due to her tall size, she sleeps outside. Jenny is the wisest out of all the animals. She acts like a mother or an older sister to Willa (and possibly Dooley). characters.name: Koko
characters.description: KokoGenderFemaleŌÖĆSpeciesKangarooLikesDressing upFashion/designingVolleyballBaton twirlingDancingIce-creamDislikesFishLoud musicFriendsWillaDooleyWilla's DadEnemiesSara, Kara, and LaraVoiced byKatie Bergin Kokois a kangaroo and one of the animals that belong to Willa. She acts maternally towards Willa, and many of the other animals. She sometimes gives Willa and her friend Dooley, as well as the smaller animals, rides in her pouch, as seen in theopening credits.  Koko is usually in charge of keepingGusfrom trying to eatThe Bunnies, and is sometimes, hiding a few in her pouch! Though she's a bit clumsy, and very enthusiastic about fashion and styling, Koko is also the main toughest of the females. Though she's a bit clumsy, and very enthusiastic about fashion and styling, Koko is also the main toughest of the females.

characters.name: The Bunnies
characters.description: GenderFemaleSpeciesBunniesRelativesEach otherFriendsWillaGusWilla's DadEdie and SteveVoiced byAll Of Them The Bunniesare recurring characters inWilla's Wild Life. There are multiple of them and come in various colors. Unlike the rest of Willa's animals, they don't really talk, but rather squeak and giggle. They usually give out kisses when they are happy. They sleep everywhere in the house. They tend to bounce all around the house, taking time out only to mysteriously multiply. They drive Dad bonkers, but he can't complain too much! He's unwittingly brought the first two home. There are multiple of them and come in various colors. Unlike the rest of Willa's animals, they don't really talk, but rather squeak and giggle.
